mapper.select: SELECT id FROM country WHERE code = #{code}
SELECT id FROM city WHERE country_id = #{countryId} AND name = #{name}
SELECT id FROM airport WHERE code = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO airport(city_id, code, name, official_url) VALUES(#{cityId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{officialUrl})
mapper.update: UPDATE airport SET city_id=#{cityId}, name=#{name}, official_url=#{officialUrl} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM bus_route WHERE source_id = #{sourceId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bus_route(airport_id, source_id, route, destination, operator, official_url, duration, price, operating_hours, last_updated, fetch_failed, content_hash) VALUES(#{airportId}, #{sourceId}, #{route}, #{destination}, #{operator}, #{officialUrl}, #{duration}, #{price}, #{operatingHours}, #{lastUpdated}, #{fetchFailed}, #{contentHash})
INSERT INTO bus_stop(bus_route_id, seq, name) VALUES(#{busId}, #{seq}, #{name})
INSERT INTO bus_schedule(bus_route_id, time_range, interval_text, note) VALUES(#{busId}, #{timeRange}, #{intervalText}, #{note})
INSERT INTO bus_image(bus_route_id, url, caption) VALUES(#{busId}, #{url}, #{caption})
INSERT INTO bus_file(bus_route_id, name, url) VALUES(#{busId}, #{name}, #{url})
INSERT INTO bus_alert(bus_route_id, type, message, start_date, end_date) VALUES(#{busId}, #{type}, #{message}, #{startDate}, #{endDate})
mapper.select: SELECT version, content_hash AS contentHash FROM bus_route WHERE source_id = #{sourceId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE bus_route SET last_verified_at=#{at}, last_verified_by=#{actor}, updated_by=#{actor} WHERE source_id=#{sourceId} AND deleted=0
UPDATE bus_route SET deleted=1, updated_by=#{actor} WHERE source_id=#{sourceId} AND deleted=0
mapper.select: SELECT a.id FROM bus_route b JOIN airport a ON a.id=b.airport_id WHERE b.source_id=#{sourceId} AND b.deleted=0
SELECT code FROM airport WHERE id=#{airportId}
SELECT a.code AS airportCode, b.last_verified_at AS lastVerifiedAt FROM bus_route b JOIN airport a ON a.id=b.airport_id WHERE b.source_id=#{sourceId} AND b.deleted=0
